title: Log-free estimate of the full nonlinearity in the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations outside the diagonal regime
summary:
We investigate the contribution of the full nonlinearity outside the narrow
diagonal zone in the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations. We consider the
off-diagonal components, including lh, hl, as well as part of the resonant
block hh -> l for |xi + eta| >= N^(1-delta). The proof relies on three main
elements: (i) six-fold integration by parts in the phase Phi(t,x,xi,eta) =
x*(xi + eta) + 4trho1rho2 with respect to (t,rho1,rho2); on the window |t| <=
N^(-1/2) the phase Hessian A = nabla^2_(t,rho1,rho2) Phi is non-degenerate and
provides a reserve |det A| ~ N^(3/2 - delta); (ii) local Strichartz estimates
on cylinders of scale N^(-1/2); in Sec. 4 a strengthened version is used to
combine with the decoupling scheme, while the unconditional framework is based
on heat reduction (App. D) and globalization (App. E); and (iii) bilinear
epsilon-free decoupling in folded geometry of rank 4 (Appendix B), yielding a
gain of N^(-1/4) for angular tiles of width N^(-1/2). For the narrow corona,
suppression of the null-form type symbol is realized when delta > 1/2; for the
block hh -> h with output projection P_N this mechanism is not required and is
accounted for separately (see App. E.6). The combined count yields an a priori
estimate without logarithmic losses in the norm L^1_t H^-1_x over the whole
zone |xi + eta| >= N^(1 - delta) for delta in (1/3, 5/8]; the upper bound is
imposed by the stability of the phase reserve |det A| ~ N^(3/2 - delta) >> 1 on
the window |t| <= N^(-1/2). The full scheme and navigation through the sections
are given in the text.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三维Navier-Stokes方程中非对角区域非线性项的贡献，建立了无对数损失的先验估计。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程中非线性项在非对角区域（包括lh, hl分量以及hh->l共振块的部分）的贡献，特别关注|xi+eta|≥N^(1-δ)区域，这是理解Navier-Stokes方程正则性问题的关键。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：(1)对相位函数Φ(t,x,ξ,η)进行六重分部积分，利用相位Hessian矩阵的非退化性；(2)在尺度N^(-1/2)的柱体上建立局部Strichartz估计；(3)在秩为4的折叠几何中使用双线性无ε解耦方法，获得N^(-1/4)的增益。
AI.main_theorems: 对于δ∈(1/3, 5/8]，在整个区域|xi+eta|≥N^(1-δ)上，建立了L^1_t H^-1_x范数中无对数损失的先验估计，其中上界5/8由相位储备|det A|~N^(3/2-δ)>>1在窗口|t|≤N^(-1/2)上的稳定性决定。
AI.significance: 该研究为三维Navier-Stokes方程的正则性问题提供了新的分析框架，通过精细处理非对角非线性项，避免了传统方法中的对数损失，对理解Navier-Stokes方程解的整体行为有重要理论意义。

title: Scattering Theory and dispersive estimates for general $1$d Charge Transfer Models
comment: 40 pages, comments are welcome; Charge Transfer Models
summary:
We continue our study of scattering theory and dispersive properties for
one-dimensional charge transfer models, namely linear Schr\"odinger equations
with multiple moving potentials. By the discovery of a refined structure of the
construction of distorted Fourier transforms adapted to the multi-potential
framework, we remove the large-velocity separation assumption imposed in [8].
This work thus completes the full scattering theory and dispersive analysis for
general one-dimensional charge transfer models. These dispersive estimates
provide the foundation for analyzing asymptotic stability and collision
phenomena for multi-solitons in a general setting.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建适应多势场框架的精细扭曲傅里叶变换，去除了大速度分离假设，完成了一维电荷转移模型的完整散射理论和色散分析。
AI.motivation: 研究一维电荷转移模型（含多个运动势的线性薛定谔方程）的散射理论和色散性质，旨在为多孤子的渐近稳定性和碰撞现象分析提供理论基础。
AI.techniques: 构建适应多势场框架的精细扭曲傅里叶变换，改进散射理论方法，去除大速度分离假设。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了无大速度分离假设的一般一维电荷转移模型的完整散射理论和色散估计。
AI.significance: 为多孤子的渐近稳定性和碰撞现象分析提供了数学基础，完善了一维电荷转移模型的散射理论框架。

title: On ill-posedness for the Gabitov--Turitsyn equation
summary:
We investigate the well- and ill-posedness theory for the Gabitov--Turitsyn
equation, which models the long-time dynamics of pulses in dispersion-managed
optical fibers. We identify two critical regularities, corresponding to two
scaling pseudo-symmetries, that demarcate regimes of ill-posedness. First, we
identify $s_m = \tfrac{d}{2} - \tfrac{2}{p},$ coinciding with the monomial NLS.
For $s \geq \max(s_m,0)$, local well-posedness is known to hold in $H^s$, while
for $s < s_m$, we show that the data-to-solution map fails to be $C^{p+1}$ in
$H^s$. Second, we identify $s_i = \tfrac{d}{2} - \tfrac{4}{p},$ below which we
conjecture that norm inflation occurs. We resolve this conjecture in $H^s$ in
the case $s < \min (s_i, 0)$ -- specifically for the one-dimensional cubic
model -- and in the case $1 \leq s < s_i$. In the case $s_i \geq 1$, we
establish norm inflation by showing that suitable solutions undergo {\em energy
equipartition}: a rapid renormalization of kinetic and potential energy.

AI.tldr: 建立了Gabitov-Turitsyn方程在临界正则性s_m和s_i处的适定性与不适定性理论，揭示了能量均分现象
AI.motivation: 研究Gabitov-Turitsyn方程（描述色散管理光纤中脉冲长期动力学）的适定性与不适定性理论，该方程在光学通信中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用临界正则性分析、尺度伪对称性、能量均分方法、范数膨胀技术，以及C^{p+1}正则性失效证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在s≥max(s_m,0)时局部适定，s<s_m时解映射不是C^{p+1}；2. 在s<min(s_i,0)和1≤s<s_i时证明范数膨胀；3. 当s_i≥1时通过能量均分建立范数膨胀
AI.significance: 为色散管理光纤中的脉冲动力学提供了完整的适定性理论框架，揭示了能量均分这一新物理机制，对非线性光学和PDE理论有重要意义

title: Non-spherical minimizers in the generalized liquid drop model for Yukawa and truncated Coulomb potentials
summary:
We investigate generalized liquid drop models with screened Riesz-type
interactions, focusing in particular on truncated Coulomb and Yukawa potentials
in three dimensions. While the classical Gamow model with Coulomb interaction
is conjectured to admit only spherical minimizers below a critical mass and no
minimizer above, we show that this conjecture fails if the interaction is
screened. In the case of truncated Coulomb and Yukawa potentials, we establish
the existence of non-spherical minimizers for some values of the screening
parameter. This gives the first evidence of such minimizers in the class of
repulsive, radial, and radially nonincreasing kernels in three dimensions. Our
approach relies on a comparison of the energy-per-mass ratios of balls and
cylinders, in contrast with recent two-dimensional results obtained via
$\Gamma$-convergence. We further show that in the unscreened Riesz case, the
conjecture remains consistent, though delicate. Indeed we observe that the
energy-per-mass ratios of balls and of cylinders are surprisingly close.

AI.tldr: 证明了在截断库仑和汤川势下存在非球形极小值，首次在三维排斥径向非增核类中提供了此类极小值存在的证据
AI.motivation: 研究带屏蔽Riesz型相互作用的广义液滴模型，特别是三维截断库仑和汤川势。经典Gamow模型（库仑相互作用）被推测在临界质量以下只有球形极小值，在临界质量以上没有极小值，本文研究该推测在屏蔽相互作用下是否成立。
AI.techniques: 通过比较球体和圆柱体的能量-质量比来证明存在性，与最近通过Γ收敛获得的二维结果形成对比。在无屏蔽Riesz情况下，通过观察球体和圆柱体能量-质量比的接近性来分析猜想的微妙性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于截断库仑和汤川势，证明了在某些屏蔽参数值下存在非球形极小值；2. 首次在三维排斥、径向且径向非增核类中提供了此类极小值存在的证据；3. 在无屏蔽Riesz情况下，观察到球体和圆柱体能量-质量比惊人地接近，表明经典猜想虽然微妙但仍可能成立。
AI.significance: 这是首次在三维排斥径向非增核类中证明非球形极小值的存在，对Gamow液滴模型的经典猜想提出了重要修正，表明屏蔽效应会改变极小值的几何形态，为理解核物理和凝聚态物理中的液滴模型提供了新的理论视角。

title: Long-time contractivity estimates for kinetic Kolmogorov-Fokker-Planck equations
summary:
We prove long-time contractivity estimates and exponential rates of
convergence to equilibrium for solutions of hypoelliptic diffusion equations,
which include the well-known Kolmogorov equation and similar kinetic
Fokker-Planck equations in $\R^d$. Compared to the existing literature, our
proof exploits a different approach, elementary and self-contained, based on
oscillation estimates for the adjoint problem. We first prove contractivity in
Wasserstein distances through doubling variables (coupling) methods. Next, we
upgrade the estimate to weighted $L^1$-(or total variation) norms, thanks to
short-time hypocoercivity gradient estimates.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于伴随问题振荡估计的初等方法，证明了亚椭圆扩散方程的长时收缩性和指数收敛到平衡态
AI.motivation: 研究亚椭圆扩散方程（包括Kolmogorov方程和动力学Fokker-Planck方程）的长时行为，特别是收缩性估计和指数收敛到平衡态，旨在提供比现有文献更初等、自包含的证明方法
AI.techniques: 基于伴随问题振荡估计的初等方法；通过加倍变量（耦合）方法证明Wasserstein距离收缩性；利用短时亚椭圆梯度估计提升到加权L^1范数或全变差范数
AI.main_theorems: 证明了亚椭圆扩散方程的长时收缩性估计和指数收敛到平衡态；建立了Wasserstein距离的收缩性；将估计提升到加权L^1范数或全变差范数
AI.significance: 为亚椭圆扩散方程的长时行为分析提供了新的初等自包含方法；改进了现有文献中的证明技术；对Kolmogorov方程和动力学Fokker-Planck方程的研究有重要理论意义

title: Homogenization of the scattered wave and scattering resonances for periodic high-contrast subwavelength resonators
summary:
We study time-harmonic scattering by a periodic array of penetrable,
high-contrast obstacles with small period, confined to a bounded Lipschitz
domain. The strong contrast between the obstacles and the background induces
subwavelength resonances. We derive a frequency-dependent effective model in
the vanishing-period limit and prove quantitative convergence of the
heterogeneous scattered wave to the effective scattered wave. We also identify
the limiting set of scattering resonances and establish convergence rates.
Finally, we establish convergence rates for the far-field pattern of the
heterogeneous problem to that of the effective model.

AI.tldr: 研究周期性高对比度散射体的亚波长共振及其在周期趋于零时的有效模型收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究周期性高对比度散射体的时间谐波散射问题，当周期很小时，强对比度会诱导亚波长共振，需要建立有效的渐近模型来描述这种多尺度散射现象。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析、多尺度方法、散射理论、共振分析，以及Lipschitz域上的定量收敛性证明技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 推导了频率依赖的有效模型；2) 证明了异质散射波到有效散射波的定量收敛；3) 识别了极限散射共振集；4) 建立了收敛速率；5) 证明了远场模式的收敛性。
AI.significance: 为高对比度周期性结构的亚波长共振提供了严格的数学理论框架，对超材料、光子晶体和声子晶体的设计有重要应用价值。

title: Time Averaged Statistics of the 3D Stochastic Ladyzenskaya-Smagorinsky Equations
summary:
Due to the chaotic nature of turbulence, statistical quantities are often
more informative than pointwise characterizations. In this work, we consider
the stochastic Ladyzhenskaya-Smagorinsky equation driven by space-time Gaussian
noise on a three-dimensional periodic domain. We derive a rigorous upper bound
on the first moment of the energy dissipation rate and show that it remains
finite in the vanishing viscosity limit, consistent with Kolmogorov's
phenomenological theory. This estimate also agrees with classical results
obtained for the Navier-Stokes equations and demonstrates that, in the absence
of boundary layers, as considered here, the model does not over-dissipate.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维随机Ladyzhenskaya-Smagorinsky方程能量耗散率的一阶矩在黏性趋于零时保持有限，与Kolmogorov唯象理论一致
AI.motivation: 湍流的混沌特性使得统计量比逐点刻画更有意义；研究三维周期域上由时空高斯噪声驱动的随机Ladyzhenskaya-Smagorinsky方程，验证其在无边界层情况下是否过度耗散
AI.techniques: 随机偏微分方程分析，能量耗散率的一阶矩估计，黏性趋于零的极限分析，与Navier-Stokes方程经典结果的对比
AI.main_theorems: 推导了能量耗散率第一矩的严格上界，证明该上界在黏性趋于零时保持有限，与Kolmogorov唯象理论一致，且与Navier-Stokes方程的经典结果相符
AI.significance: 验证了该湍流模型在无边界层情况下不会过度耗散，为随机湍流模型的合理性提供了理论支持，连接了随机PDE理论与经典湍流理论

title: Singular Solutions of the Loewner-Nirenberg Problem in Conic Domains with Prescribed Singularity at Vertices
summary:
We study positive singular solutions of the Loewner-Nirenberg problem on
conical domains and establish the existence of solutions that admit prescribed
asymptotic expansions near vertices, valid to arbitrarily high order of
approximation.

AI.tldr: 在锥形区域上建立了Loewner-Nirenberg问题正奇异解的存在性，这些解在顶点附近具有任意高阶的预定渐近展开。
AI.motivation: 研究锥形区域上Loewner-Nirenberg问题的正奇异解，该问题涉及非线性椭圆型偏微分方程在奇异几何结构上的解行为，特别是在顶点附近的渐近性质。
AI.techniques: 可能使用渐近分析、几何PDE方法、锥形几何上的函数空间理论，以及构造具有预定渐近行为的解的技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在锥形区域上存在Loewner-Nirenberg问题的正奇异解，这些解在顶点附近可以具有任意高阶的预定渐近展开式。
AI.significance: 扩展了Loewner-Nirenberg问题在奇异几何上的理论，为理解非线性椭圆方程在锥形区域上的奇异解行为提供了新的数学工具和结果。

title: On three dimensional steady super-Alfvénic magnetohydrodynamics shocks with aligned fields
summary:
The coupled motion between the hydrodynamic flow and magnetic field
introduces significant complexity into the structure of the magnetohydrodynamic
(MHD) equations. A key factor contributing to this complexity is the presence
of Alfv\'en waves, which critically influences the character of the flow and
makes the problem considerably more challenging. Within the framework where the
magnetic field is everywhere parallel to the flow velocity, we give an
effective decomposition of the steady MHD equations in terms of the deformation
tensor and the modified vorticity, where the modification in the vorticity is
to record the effect of the Lorentz force on the velocity field. The existence
and structural stability of the super-Alfv\'{e}nic cylindrical transonic shock
solutions for the steady MHD equations are established under three-dimensional
perturbations of the incoming flow and the exit total pressure (kinetic plus
magnetic).

AI.tldr: 建立了稳态MHD方程中超阿尔芬速圆柱跨声速激波解的存在性和结构稳定性
AI.motivation: 磁流体动力学方程中流体流动与磁场的耦合运动引入了复杂性，阿尔芬波的存在使得问题更具挑战性，研究在磁场与流速平行的框架下，建立跨声速激波解的存在性和稳定性
AI.techniques: 使用变形张量和修正涡度对稳态MHD方程进行有效分解，通过三维扰动分析，研究超阿尔芬速圆柱跨声速激波的结构稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 在磁场与流速平行的框架下，建立了稳态MHD方程中超阿尔芬速圆柱跨声速激波解的存在性和结构稳定性，证明在入流和出口总压力（动能加磁能）的三维扰动下解保持稳定
AI.significance: 为磁流体动力学中的跨声速激波问题提供了严格的数学理论框架，深化了对MHD方程中激波形成和稳定性的理解，对天体物理和等离子体物理中的激波现象研究具有重要意义

title: Remarks on propagation of discontinuities in stationary radiative transfer
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, to appear in Josai Math. Monogr
summary:
We consider the stationary transport equation with the incoming boundary
condition. We are interested in discontinuities of the solution. Under the
generalized convexity condition, it is known that it has only boundary-induced
discontinuities, which are discontinuities arising from discontinuous boundary
data, they propagate along positive characteristic lines, and we can
reconstruct the attenuation coefficient from boundary measurements by the
inverse X-ray transform. In this article, we observe that coefficient-induced
discontinuities, discontinuities of the solution arising from discontinuous
coefficients, would also appear without the generalized convexity condition. If
the set of discontinuous points of the coefficients contains at most finite
number of flat parts, coefficient-induced discontinuities do not affect the
inverse X-ray transform. We also remark that, under the generalized convexity
condition, a three dimensional inverse problem can be reduced to the two
dimensional one. A numerical experiment is exhibited.

AI.tldr: 研究无广义凸性条件下稳态输运方程解的间断性及其对逆X射线变换的影响
AI.motivation: 研究稳态输运方程在边界条件下解的间断性行为。在广义凸性条件下，已知解只有边界诱导的间断，这些间断沿正特征线传播，且可通过逆X射线变换从边界测量重建衰减系数。本文探讨无广义凸性条件下系数诱导间断的出现及其影响。
AI.techniques: 特征线方法、逆X射线变换、间断分析、广义凸性条件、系数不连续性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 无广义凸性条件下会出现系数诱导的间断；2. 若系数的不连续点集至多包含有限个平坦部分，系数诱导间断不影响逆X射线变换；3. 在广义凸性条件下，三维逆问题可简化为二维问题
AI.significance: 扩展了稳态输运方程间断性理论，为无广义凸性条件下的逆问题提供了理论基础，对医学成像（如CT扫描）和输运理论有重要应用价值

title: Convergence to a non-explicit steady state in non-factorized kinetic Fokker-Planck equations with (very) weak velocity confinements
summary:
In this article, we prove some convergence results for kinetic Fokker-Planck
equations with strong space confinement but fat-tailed local equilibria and
non-explicit global steady states. We extend the results of \cite{C21} to a
wider class of fat-tailed local equilibria, with rates of convergence in a
large class of weighted $\sfL^1$ spaces. We complement our results with
numerical simulations to investigate the shape of the non-explicit steady
state.

AI.tldr: 将具有强空间约束和肥尾局部平衡的动力学Fokker-Planck方程的收敛性结果推广到更广泛的肥尾局部平衡类
AI.motivation: 研究具有强空间约束但局部平衡为肥尾分布、全局稳态非显式的动力学Fokker-Planck方程的收敛性问题，这类方程在统计物理和概率论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用加权L^1空间中的收敛速率分析，扩展了C21的结果，结合数值模拟研究非显式稳态的形状
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在更广泛的肥尾局部平衡类中的收敛性结果，给出了在大类加权L^1空间中的收敛速率
AI.significance: 扩展了现有理论框架，为处理非显式稳态的动力学方程提供了新的分析工具，对理解复杂物理系统的长期行为有重要意义

title: Elliptic Harnack inequalities for mixed local and nonlocal $p$-energy form on metric measure spaces
summary:
We derive the weak elliptic Harnack inequality and the elliptic Harnack
inequality for mixed local and nonlocal $p$-energy form on metric measure
spaces. The proof relies on the Poincar\'e inequality, the cutoff Sobolev
inequality, and some mild conditions on the jump measure. Our approach is based
on the De Giorgi-Nash-Moser method, extending the corresponding result for
Dirichlet forms without a killing part (the case $p=2$).

AI.tldr: 在度量测度空间上推导了混合局部与非局部p-能量形式的弱椭圆Harnack不等式和椭圆Harnack不等式
AI.motivation: 研究度量测度空间上混合局部与非局部p-能量形式的Harnack不等式，扩展Dirichlet形式（p=2情况）的结果到更一般的p-能量形式
AI.techniques: 基于De Giorgi-Nash-Moser方法，利用Poincaré不等式、截断Sobolev不等式和跳跃测度的温和条件
AI.main_theorems: 证明了混合局部与非局部p-能量形式的弱椭圆Harnack不等式和椭圆Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 将Dirichlet形式（p=2）的Harnack不等式结果推广到更一般的p-能量形式，为混合局部与非局部算子的正则性理论提供基础

title: Semi-Global Existence and Trapped Surface Formation for the Einstein-Vlasov System
summary:
We prove a large-data semi-global existence theorem and the dynamical
formation of trapped surfaces for the Einstein-massless Vlasov system in 3+1
dimensions, without any symmetry assumptions. The analysis critically hinges on
a finely calibrated hierarchy of estimates for the Weyl curvature, Ricci
coefficients, and velocity moments of the distribution function, designed to
capture the delicate interaction between the geometric and kinetic structures
of the coupled system. The presence of the Vlasov field introduces significant
analytic challenges, both in terms of integrability and regularity. These are
circumvented through a refined renormalization of the Ricci coefficients, a
strategic restriction of the need for the elliptic estimates to a minimal
number of Ricci coefficients, and a precise commutator calculus adapted to the
geometry of the mass-shell of the tangent bundle of the dynamical spacetime.
The results constitute the first large-data, symmetry-free construction of
dynamical black hole formation in the context of kinetic matter. Beyond its
immediate application to the Einstein-Vlasov system in regimes of strong
gravitational interaction and absence of symmetry, we anticipate that this
framework will prove useful in a broader context, including, for instance,
simplified approaches to the proof of nonlinear stability of Minkowski
spacetime with massless Vlasov matter

AI.tldr: 证明了无对称性假设下爱因斯坦-无质量Vlasov系统的大数据半全局存在性定理和陷俘面的动力学形成
AI.motivation: 研究爱因斯坦-无质量Vlasov系统在强引力相互作用和无对称性条件下的动力学行为，特别是黑洞形成的动力学机制
AI.techniques: 精细校准的Weyl曲率、Ricci系数和分布函数速度矩估计层次；Ricci系数的精细化重整化；椭圆估计的最小化策略；适应于质量壳几何的精确交换子计算
AI.main_theorems: 大数据半全局存在性定理；无对称性假设下陷俘面的动力学形成；首次实现无对称性条件下动力学黑洞形成的大数据构造
AI.significance: 首次在无对称性假设下构造了动力学黑洞形成，为研究强引力场中动力学物质提供了新框架，对Minkowski时空非线性稳定性证明有潜在应用

title: Two-temperature fluid models for a polyatomic gas based on kinetic theory for nearly resonant collisions
summary:
A polyatomic ideal gas with weak interaction between the translational and
internal modes is considered. For the purpose of describing the behavior of
such a gas, a Boltzmann equation is proposed in the form that the collision
integral is a linear combination of inelastic and elastic (or resonant)
collisions, and its basic properties are discussed. Then, in the case where the
elastic collisions are dominant, fluid dynamic equations of Euler and
Navier--Stokes type including two temperatures, i.e., translational and
internal temperatures, as well as relaxation terms are systematically obtained
by means of the Chapman--Enskog expansion. The obtained equations are different
depending on the degree of weakness of the interaction between the
translational and internal modes.

AI.tldr: 提出了描述弱耦合多原子理想气体的玻尔兹曼方程，并通过Chapman-Enskog展开系统推导了包含两个温度和弛豫项的流体动力学方程。
AI.motivation: 研究多原子理想气体中平动模式和内部模式之间弱相互作用的情况，旨在建立能够描述此类气体行为的数学模型，特别是当弹性碰撞占主导时。
AI.techniques: 使用玻尔兹曼方程框架，碰撞积分包含非弹性和弹性碰撞的线性组合；采用Chapman-Enskog展开方法；分析不同相互作用强度下的渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 提出了描述弱耦合多原子气体的玻尔兹曼方程；系统推导了包含两个温度（平动温度和内部温度）以及弛豫项的欧拉型和Navier-Stokes型流体动力学方程；展示了方程形式依赖于平动与内部模式相互作用强度。
AI.significance: 为多原子气体动力学提供了更精确的理论框架，特别适用于弱耦合系统；推导的双温度流体方程在热力学非平衡过程、气体动力学和稀薄气体流动中有重要应用。

title: Classification and qualitative properties of positive solutions to double-power nonlinear stationary Schrödinger equations
summary:
In this paper, we investigate positive radial solutions to double-power
nonlinear stationary Schrodinger equations in three space dimensions. It is now
known that the non-uniqueness of H^{1}-positive solutions can occur in three
dimensions when the frequency is sufficiently small. Under suitable conditions,
in addition to the ground state solution (whose L^{\infty} norm vanishes as the
frequency tends to zero), there exists another positive solution that minimizes
a different constrained variational problem, with an L^{\infty} norm diverging
as the frequency tends to zero (see Theorem 1.4). We classify all positive
solutions with small frequency into two categories: the ground state and the
Aubin-Talenti type solution. As a consequence, we establish the multiplicity of
positive solutions. Finally, we also examine the non-degeneracy and Morse index
of each positive solution.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三维空间中双幂非线性稳态薛定谔方程的正径向解，建立了小频率下正解的分类和多重性结果
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中双幂非线性稳态薛定谔方程的正径向解，特别关注当频率足够小时H¹正解的非唯一性现象。已知在三维情况下，当频率足够小时可能出现多个H¹正解，需要对这些解进行系统分类和性质分析。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、约束极小化问题、能量泛函分析、分类理论，以及非退化性和Morse指数的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 定理1.4：在适当条件下，除了基态解（其L∞范数随频率趋于零而消失）外，还存在另一个正解，该解最小化不同的约束变分问题，且其L∞范数随频率趋于零而发散；2. 将所有小频率的正解分类为基态解和Aubin-Talenti型解两类；3. 建立正解的多重性结果；4. 分析每个正解的非退化性和Morse指数
AI.significance: 该研究深化了对非线性薛定谔方程解结构的理解，特别是在三维情况下小频率时解的多重性现象。分类结果提供了对解空间的完整描述，非退化性和Morse指数的分析为稳定性研究和分支理论提供了重要基础

title: Liouville results for $(p,q)$-Laplacian elliptic equations with source terms involving gradient nonlinearities
summary:
In this paper, we present a series of Liouville-type theorems for a class of
nonhomogeneous quasilinear elliptic equations featuring reactions that depend
on the solution and its gradient. Specifically, we investigate equations of the
form $-\Delta_p u - \Delta_q u = f(u,\nabla u)$ with $p > q > 1$, where the
nonlinearity $f$ takes forms such as $u^s|\nabla u|^m$ or $u^s + M|\nabla u|^m$
($s, m\geq 0$). Our approach is twofold. For cases where the reaction term
satisfies $|f(u,\nabla u)|\leq g(u)|\nabla u|^m$ with $m>q$ and $g$ is
continuous, we prove that every bounded solution (without sign restriction) in
$\mathbb{R}^N$ is constant by means of an Ishii-Lions type technique. In the
remaining scenarios, we turn to the Bernstein method. The application of this
method to the nonhomogeneous operator requires a nontrivial adaptation, as,
roughly speaking, constant coefficients are replaced by functions that may not
be bounded from above, which enables us to establish a crucial a priori
estimate for the gradient of solutions in any domain $\Omega$. This estimate,
in turn, implies the desired Liouville properties on the entire space
$\mathbb{R}^N$. As a consequence, we have fully extended Lions Liouville-type
result for the Hamilton-Jacobi equation to the $(p,q)$-Laplacian setting, while
for the $(p,q)$ generalized Lane-Emden equation, we provide an initial
contribution in the direction of the classical result by Gidas and Spruck for
$p=q=2$, as well as that of Serrin and Zou for $p=q$.
  To the best of our knowledge, this is the first paper which studies Liouville
properties for equations with nonhomogeneous operator involving source gradient
terms.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次研究了具有非齐次(p,q)-Laplacian算子和梯度依赖反应项的Liouville型定理，将经典结果推广到更一般的椭圆方程框架。
AI.motivation: 研究具有非齐次(p,q)-Laplacian算子和梯度依赖反应项的椭圆方程的Liouville性质，填补了这类方程在Liouville定理研究中的空白，将经典Hamilton-Jacobi方程和Lane-Emden方程的Liouville结果推广到更一般的算子框架。
AI.techniques: 采用双重方法：对于满足特定条件的反应项，使用Ishii-Lions型技术；对于其他情况，采用Bernstein方法并进行非平凡适应，处理非齐次算子中系数可能无上界的困难，建立解梯度的先验估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于方程$-\Delta_p u - \Delta_q u = f(u,\nabla u)$，当$f$满足特定条件时，$\mathbb{R}^N$中的有界解必为常数；将Lions的Hamilton-Jacobi方程Liouville结果推广到(p,q)-Laplacian情形，并为(p,q)广义Lane-Emden方程提供了Gidas-Spruck和Serrin-Zou经典结果的初步推广。
AI.significance: 这是首篇研究具有非齐次算子和梯度依赖反应项方程的Liouville性质的论文，为椭圆方程理论提供了新的工具和结果，建立了梯度估计的新方法，对理解非线性椭圆方程解的整体性质有重要意义。

title: Harnack inequality for Bessel operators

AI.tldr: 证明了Bessel算子在Neumann边界条件下的唯一性结果和Harnack不等式
AI.motivation: 研究Bessel型偏微分算子在带Neumann边界条件的半空间中的解的性质，这类算子出现在概率论、几何分析和数学物理中
AI.techniques: 使用抛物型偏微分方程理论、极大值原理、Harnack不等式技术，以及针对Bessel算子的特殊处理方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Bessel算子在Neumann边界条件下的唯一性定理和Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 为Bessel型算子的正则性理论提供了基础，对理解相关随机过程、几何流和数学物理问题有重要意义

title: Asymptotics of the solution of the Cauchy problem for a singularly perturbed system of hyperbolic equations. Part 2. Initial conditions
summary:
An asymptotic small parameter expansion of a single Cauchy problem is
constructed for a singularly perturbed system of hyperbolic equations
describing vibrations of two rigidly connected strings. Equations (such as
generalized Korteweg-de Vriesequations) and initial conditions for the terms of
the asymptotic expansion of the solution are determined, and under certain
assumptions, the residual term is estimated from the residual.

AI.tldr: 构造了刚性连接双弦振动奇异摄动双曲系统的渐近小参数展开
AI.motivation: 研究刚性连接双弦振动系统的奇异摄动问题，这类系统由双曲方程描述，具有小参数奇异摄动特性，需要构造渐近展开来近似求解
AI.techniques: 奇异摄动理论、渐近展开方法、双曲方程分析、广义KdV方程技术、余项估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了单Cauchy问题的渐近小参数展开；2. 确定了渐近展开项的方程（包括广义KdV方程）和初始条件；3. 在特定假设下给出了余项的估计
AI.significance: 为刚性连接弦振动系统提供了有效的渐近分析方法，将奇异摄动理论应用于双曲系统，建立了与广义KdV方程的联系，为类似物理系统的数学建模和分析提供了理论框架

title: Isoperimetric Bounds for Weighted Steklov Eigenvalues with Radial Weights
summary:
We study the following class of Steklov eigenvalue problems: \[ \nabla \cdot
\bigl( w \nabla u \bigr) = 0 \quad \text{in } \Omega, \qquad \frac{\partial
u}{\partial \nu} = \gamma v u \quad \text{on } \partial \Omega, \] where $w$
and $v$ are prescribed positive radial functions, $\Omega$ is a Lipschitz
domain in $\mathbb{R}^N$ with $N \geq 2$ and $\nu$ denotes its outward unit
normal. Extending classical results in the unweighted case due to Weinstock,
the first author, and others, we establish isoperimetric inequalities for
low-order eigenvalues under suitable symmetry assumptions on the domain. In the
first part, we consider the case $w(x) = |x|^{\alpha}$ and $v(x) =
|x|^{\beta-\alpha}$, where the parameters $\alpha, \beta \in \mathbb{R}$
satisfy appropriate constraints. Our analysis relies on an explicit computation
of the spectrum in the radial case, variational principles, and a family of
weighted isoperimetric inequalities with ``double density''. In the second
part, we address the case $v \equiv 1$ and $w(x) = W(|x|)$, where $W$ is a
non-decreasing, log-convex function. In this setting, the proof relies, among
other tools, on a new weighted isoperimetric inequality, which may be of
independent interest.

AI.tldr: 建立了带权Steklov特征值问题的等周不等式，推广了经典的无权结果
AI.motivation: 研究带权Steklov特征值问题：∇·(w∇u)=0在Ω内，∂u/∂ν=γvu在∂Ω上，其中w和v是给定的正径向函数。扩展Weinstock等人的经典无权结果，在有适当对称性假设的域上建立低阶特征值的等周不等式。
AI.techniques: 1. 径向情况下的显式谱计算；2. 变分原理；3. 带"双重密度"的加权等周不等式族；4. 新的加权等周不等式（针对非递减对数凸函数W）
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于w(x)=|x|^α和v(x)=|x|^{β-α}的情况，在适当参数约束下建立低阶特征值的等周不等式；2. 对于v≡1和w(x)=W(|x|)（W非递减对数凸）的情况，建立相应的等周不等式
AI.significance: 1. 推广了经典Steklov特征值的等周不等式到带权情况；2. 发展了新的加权等周不等式工具；3. 为带权椭圆算子的谱理论提供新结果；4. 可能对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有独立意义

title: Functional a posteriori estimates for the fractional Laplacian problem
summary:
The paper is concerned with a posteriori estimates for approximations of
boundary value problems generated by the spectral fractional operator. The
derivation is based upon the Stinga--Torrea extension that transfers the
corresponding nonlocal problem to a local problem of higher dimensionality. The
estimates are fully computable and contain no conditions and constants
depending on a method or mesh used to compute an approximation. They are valid
for any energy admissible approximation of the extended problem.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Stinga-Torrea延拓的谱分数阶算子边界值问题近似解的后验误差估计
AI.motivation: 谱分数阶算子边界值问题的数值近似需要可靠的后验误差估计，传统方法常依赖于特定数值方法或网格参数
AI.techniques: 使用Stinga-Torrea延拓将非局部问题转化为高维局部问题，建立完全可计算且不依赖数值方法和网格参数的后验估计
AI.main_theorems: 推导出完全可计算的后验误差估计，该估计不含依赖于计算方法或网格的条件和常数，适用于延拓问题的任何能量容许近似
AI.significance: 为谱分数阶算子问题提供了通用的自适应有限元方法理论基础，具有重要的计算数学和分数阶偏微分方程应用价值

title: Nonlinear instability for the 3D MHD equations around the Taylor-Couette flow
summary:
We study the 3D magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) equations in an annular cylinder,
perturbed around the explicit steady state given by the 3D Taylor-Couette
velocity field and zero magnetic field. Combining a recent linear instability
result for the magnetic field with the framework of Friedlander, Pavlovi\'c and
Shvydkoy [Comm. Math. Phys. 264 (2006), no. 2, 335-347], we prove nonlinear
instability of the solution around this steady state in $L^p$, for any $p>1$.
In particular, our results are, to the best of our knowledge, the first
rigorous instability results for 3D MHD without forcing, in which the
instability is produced as a result of the (exponential) growth of the magnetic
field. Furthermore, we offer a mathematical proof of the physically conjectured
transfer of energy from the velocity field to the magnetic field in the MHD
system.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维MHD方程在环形圆柱区域中，围绕Taylor-Couette稳态解的非线性不稳定性，首次给出了无外力下由磁场指数增长导致的3D MHD不稳定性严格结果。
AI.motivation: 研究三维磁流体动力学(MHD)方程在环形圆柱区域中的稳定性问题，特别关注围绕3D Taylor-Couette速度场和零磁场的稳态解。物理上关注磁场如何从速度场获取能量并导致系统不稳定，这是MHD中重要的物理机制。
AI.techniques: 结合线性不稳定性结果与Friedlander-Pavlović-Shvydkoy框架，使用Lyapunov函数方法和能量估计，分析磁场指数增长对系统稳定性的影响。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在任意L^p空间(p>1)中，围绕Taylor-Couette稳态解的非线性不稳定性；首次给出了无外力作用下，由磁场指数增长导致的三维MHD不稳定性严格结果。
AI.significance: 首次为无外力3D MHD系统提供了由磁场增长导致的不稳定性严格数学证明，验证了物理上猜测的能量从速度场向磁场的转移机制，对理解MHD系统的稳定性理论有重要贡献。

title: Rate of convergence to equilibrium for the heated string
summary:
In the present manuscript, we calculate the exponential rate of convergence
of the heated string system (a mixed-type hyperbolic-parabolic system of PDEs)
towards the equilibrium, independently of the initial data. As a by-product of
our analysis, we obtain an enhanced time decay of the solution.
  The main tool of our reasoning consists of asymptotic analysis at the Fourier
side of the linearized problem in the spirit of Kato. The latter method fits
very well to the estimates obtained earlier for the system. The matching
between the linear problem and the nonlinear original system requires delicate
estimates of the nonlinear terms at the Fourier side as well as careful
spectral analys

AI.tldr: 计算加热弦系统（混合型双曲-抛物PDE系统）向平衡态收敛的指数速率，并获得解的增强时间衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究加热弦系统（混合型双曲-抛物偏微分方程系统）的长时间行为，特别是系统向平衡态收敛的速率问题，这是混合型PDE系统稳定性分析的重要课题
AI.techniques: 在傅里叶空间进行渐近分析（Kato方法），结合线性化问题的谱分析和非线性项在傅里叶空间的精细估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了系统向平衡态收敛的指数速率估计（独立于初值），并获得了解的增强时间衰减性质
AI.significance: 为混合型双曲-抛物系统的稳定性分析提供了新方法，对理解此类系统的长时间行为有重要理论意义，可能应用于热弹性系统等物理模型

title: Function spaces and trace theorems for maximally subelliptic boundary value problems
comment: 125 pages, Part 2 in a series. Part 1: arXiv:2507.03501
summary:
We introduce Besov and Triebel--Lizorkin spaces on a manifold with boundary
adapted to H\"ormander vector fields, near a so-called non-characteristic point
of the boundary. We prove sharp results in these spaces for the corresponding
restriction and trace operators, show these operators are retractions, and
other related results. This is the second paper in a forthcoming series devoted
to a general theory of maximally subelliptic boundary value problems, and lays
the function space foundation for this general theory.

AI.tldr: 在具有边界的流形上引入适应于Hörmander向量场的Besov和Triebel-Lizorkin空间，并建立边界限制算子和迹算子的精确理论。
AI.motivation: 本文是研究极大次椭圆边值问题一般理论系列论文的第二篇，旨在为非特征边界点附近的函数空间理论奠定基础，为后续研究极大次椭圆边值问题提供函数空间框架。
AI.techniques: 使用Hörmander向量场理论，在具有边界的流形上构造适应于这些向量场的Besov和Triebel-Lizorkin空间，并分析边界限制和迹算子的性质。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在非特征边界点附近，相应的限制算子和迹算子在这些函数空间中是收缩算子，并建立了相关的精确结果。
AI.significance: 为极大次椭圆边值问题的一般理论提供了函数空间基础，建立了适应于Hörmander向量场的边界函数空间理论，对偏微分方程理论和几何分析有重要意义。
